title: PM Task Write Surface (Minimal)
objective: Implement the next bounded task write runtime slice by adding create and update contracts, minimal mutation services, and POST/PATCH endpoints for work.tasks only, reusing the proven packet-013 validation posture for intra-work references while preserving all non-task PM entities as read-only.
constrained_outputs: Create and update schemas for work.tasks only
Minimal mutation services and router wiring for POST and PATCH task endpoints
Merged validation behavior for the active intra-work references consumed by tasks, especially work_package_id and primary_wbs_node_id
Focused regression evidence proving packet-010a, packet-010b, packet-011f, packet-013, packet-013i, and packet-013j surfaces remain intact after the minimal task-write addition
validation_steps: Confirm packet 014 adds write runtime support for work.tasks only and does not broaden mutation scope to assignments, dependencies, execution issues, or progress snapshots
Confirm the minimal task write surface validates work_package_id and primary_wbs_node_id through the existing bounded mutation-service posture without authoring new SQL or schema changes
Confirm no new read-schema expansion is introduced beyond the minimum create/update contracts required for task writes

Confirm packet-010a model tests, packet-010b API tests, packet-011f project-write tests, packet-013 work-package write tests, packet-013i integration-smoke tests, packet-013j response-enrichment tests, and any new task-write tests pass after the write-surface addition
sql_permission_note: Packet 014 is runtime write-surface work only. No new SQL, schema changes, migration edits, or broader mutation-scope expansion are authorized.
